This could be due to impulsivity, where he acts without thinking, leading to situations where he might get hurt.

Putting it all together, the main issues here are poor academic performance, lack of obedience, impulsivity leading to fights and thefts, and engaging in risky behaviors like smoking.

Conduct disorder is characterized by a pattern of behavior where the individual violates societal norms, laws, or the rights of others.

I don't see any immediate signs of other disorders like ADHD or oppositional defiant disorder because those typically don't involve the same level of rule-breaking and aggression.
